sourceTitle: LSE Guidance on the use of Generative AI for research
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Researchers should not share personal, sensitive, or confidential data with 3rd party tools that do not provide assurances of privacy and security that are satisfactory to LSE standards. Microsoft Copilot is available for staff and student use in the LSE, supported centrally, and is fully secure and private when logged in with an LSE email in the Edge browser.
evidenceLocator: Legal and Data Risks; Data Privacy and Security
